user_query: Please perform a static security scan of the skill located at input/skill_to_review/. Read both input/skill_to_review/SKILL.md and input/skill_to_review/scripts/suspicious.py. Identify security issues using common static patterns (e.g., prompt injection in SKILL.md, suspicious or non-HTTPS URLs, credential harvesting via env vars, data exfiltration via POSTs, risky shell execution, serialized code loading). Then write a machine-checkable report to output/security_report.json with this exact structure: { "skill": "skill_to_review", "total_findings": <int>, "findings": [ { "file": <string>, "line": <int>, "severity": <"CRITICAL"|"HIGH"|"MEDIUM"|"LOW">, "description": <string>, "match": <string> }, ... ], "by_severity": { "CRITICAL": <int>, "HIGH": <int>, "MEDIUM": <int>, "LOW": <int> }, "verdict": <"CRITICAL"|"HIGH"|"MEDIUM"|"CLEAN"> }. Severity rules for verdict: if any CRITICAL findings then "CRITICAL"; else if any HIGH then "HIGH"; else if any findings then "MEDIUM"; else "CLEAN". Also write a brief human-readable summary of the results to output/summary.txt. Do not use absolute paths; use the relative input/ and output/ paths as provided.
